title: More Nonsense Limerick 11
content:
There was an old person of Shields,
    Who frequented the vallies and fields;
    All the mice and the cats, 
    And the snakes and the rats,
    Followed after that person of Shields.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Edward Lear, titled "More Nonsense Limerick 11", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
